free_text: Angle and energy distributions of inelastically
scattered neutrons with initial energy of 9.1 MeV.
Neutron spectrometer on the basis of
.Hollow cylinders with outer diameter 5 cm, inner
diameter 1.5 cm, length 6 cm. Natural isotope mixture.
Time of flight method with resolution 2.5 nsec/m
to the (n,p) scattering cross section taken from Fast
.Corrections is introduced on multiple scattering and
Energy scale calibration - 3.% at 1 MeV, 9.% at 7 MeV;
Error due to correction for neutron attenuation
Error in definition of absolute c-s of
M.M. BIB and COMMON information was added.
Free text was corrected to be human-readable.
